name: Ultimate Super Bean
short_description: Ultimate Super Bean is a multiplayer, fast paced, parkour shooter. You can fight with friends or bots in different game modes. Collect skins, explore the maps, and master the guns. Have fun in this world of beans!
detailed_description: Ultimate Super Bean is a fast paced, parkour shooter! Fight other beans in many game modes. We have a few different modes to enjoy. Such as our Basic Arcade mode, where you just get to shoot other people for fun. Or Crown King, where you collect the crown to get points. There is certainly something fun for everyone in Ultimate Super Bean! Shoot other beans to get gems, which you can use to buy skins in the shop. We have many different maps, some are game mode specific, or choose a map in the Arcade mode. We also have tons of fun guns and weapons to use, these guns cycle out so you never get bored of the same guns. And if you create an Arcade mode with just you, there are angry bots that will fight against you, so you aren't alone! These bots will disappear if someone else joins. Have fun, and be the ultimate bean!!
